description_long: This object is a small bird with a streamlined body and a long, slender tail. Its plumage is primarily a mix of dark brown and black, with subtle gradients and some lighter brown areas along the wings and underparts. The head is rounded and dark, with a short, pointed beak that is slightly curved downward. The wings are compact and held close to the body, while the tail extends straight back and tapers to a point. The legs are short and not prominently visible, suggesting they are tucked beneath the body. The overall appearance is sleek and well-adapted for agile flight, typical of urban-dwelling passerine birds.
description: A small, streamlined bird with dark brown and black plumage, a pointed beak, and a long, slender tail. Its body is sleek and compact, with subtle color gradients and a smooth feather texture.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's elongated body, pointed beak, and long, straight tail with visible brown and black feather gradients.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the narrow tail and the subtle brown coloration along the back and wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same streamlined profile, with the beak and tail clearly visible and the dark plumage prominent.
description_view_3: Front view showing the rounded head, short beak, and the symmetry of the wings and tail feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark with subtle gradients and lighter brown patches on wings and underparts
